title: Chemical Fixation and embedding of cultured cells for Transmission Electron Microscopy
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ca8uj","text":"This protocol can be followed to fix primary cultured neurons (or cells in general) and embed them in epoxy resin. Later ultrathin sections can be obtained with an ultramicrotome for Transmission Electron Microscopy imaging.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3anou","text":"The reagents used in this protocol are toxic!","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"e0tdn","text":"Please work under a chemical hood with golves and lab coat for all steps of this protocol!","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"69ivp","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fdqt0","text":"glutaraldehyde, osmium tetroxide are highly toxic","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"976h","text":"also sodium cacodylate buffer contains arsenic and is toxic","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9iqf6","text":"uranyl acetate is radioactive ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d2i36","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5t2ko","text":"do not inhale/ingest/touch without gloves and read the safety information for each reagent before starting to work.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Fix for 1 hr at RT in 1.25% glutaraldehyde in 66mM sodium cacodylate buffer
Wash 3 times with 0.1 M sodium cacodylate buffer
Postfix 1 hr in 1% OsO4 (optional: for better contrast add 1.5% K4Fe(CN)6 to the osmium solution) in 0.1M sodium cacodylate buffer
Wash 3x10' with 0.1 M sodium cacodylate buffer
En bloc stain for 45' in 1% uranyl acetate solution in distilled H2O
Dehydrate by incubating in increasing EtOH concentrations: 10 minutes in 70%, 10 minutes in 80%, 10 minutes in 96%, 2x15 minutes in 100%
Infiltrate in 30% Epoxy resin in EtOH
10. Infiltrate in 70% Epoxy resin in EtOH
11. Infiltrate in 90% Epoxy resin in EtOH
15. Remove the glass coverslip from the resin block by thermal shock
creator: Marta Orlando
